Equipment & Enhancement

Forge the strongest arsenal and fully enhance your combat power

Home›Equipment

Equipment Grade System

Equipment grade determines base stat caps and enhancement potential

Legend Epic Rare Uncommon Common
GradeAcquisitionEnhance CapBonus StatsRating
LegendMine War rewards, World Boss drops, special events+204 random stats + set effect⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
EpicAdvanced dungeons, guild auction, crafting+153 random stats⭐⭐⭐⭐
RareMain quests, daily dungeon drops+102 random stats⭐⭐⭐
UncommonQuest rewards, monster drops+51 random stat⭐⭐
CommonShop purchase, early drops+3None⭐

Enhancement System Detailed

Equipment Enhancement Rules

Equipment enhancement is the core path to boosting combat power. Use enhancement stones and gold to enhance equipment, with each level increasing base stats. Higher enhance levels have lower success rates, but the game has a pity system — failure won't degrade or break equipment.

  • +1~+5: 100% success rate, enhance without worry
  • +6~+10: Success rate gradually decreases, use protection charms
  • +11~+15: High-risk phase, must use advanced protection charms
  • +16~+20: Ultimate enhancement, requires legendary materials and massive resources

Enhancement Materials Overview

Enhance PhaseMaterials NeededGold CostSuccess RateRecommendation
+1 ~ +5Normal Enhancement Stone x3~85,000 ~ 20,000100%Enhance directly
+6 ~ +8Advanced Enhancement Stone x5~1230,000 ~ 80,00085%~70%Use protection charm
+9 ~ +10Advanced Enhancement Stone x15~20100,000 ~ 150,00055%~40%Must use protection charm
+11 ~ +13Superior Enhancement Stone x8~15200,000 ~ 500,00030%~20%Adv. charm + luck potion
+14 ~ +15Superior Enhancement Stone x20~30600,000 ~ 1,000,00015%~10%Wait for double rate events
+16 ~ +20Legendary Enhancement Stone x10~301,500,000+<10%Endgame goal, go at your own pace

Enhancement Strategy Tip

With limited early resources, prioritize enhancing your weapon to +10 and armor to +7. Enhancement priority: Weapon > Chest > Helmet > Gloves > Boots. Only legendary-grade equipment is worth investing top enhancement materials in.

Ultimate Weapon Development

The three ultimate weapons are each race's strategic core — well-developed, they can turn the tide of battle

Bellato

MAU Armor

Unlock: Complete Race Main Story Ch.4
Core Material: Armor Core Fragments (Mine Wars)
Focus: Armor Durability > Weapon Power > Move Speed

Recommended: Firepower Suppression

Accretia

Launcher

Unlock: Complete Race Main Story Ch.4
Core Material: Cannon Parts (Guild Auction)
Focus: Ammo Capacity > AoE Damage > Reload Speed

Recommended: Area Bombardment

Cora

Animus Summon

Unlock: Complete Race Main Story Ch.4
Core Material: Arcane Essence (World Boss drops)
Focus: Summon Duration > Attack Power > Skill Cooldown

Recommended: Sustained DPS
